Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Find a Friend", "cost": ["Grass"], "convertedEnergyCost": 1, "damage": "", "text": "Search your deck for a Grass Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck."}]
Attack_Texts: Search your deck for a Grass Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
FlavorText: A strange seed was planted on its back at birth. The plant sprouts and grows with this Pokémon.

Abilities: [{"name": "Table Service", "text": "Once during your turn (before your attack), you may heal 30 damage from 1 of your Pokémon.", "type": "Ability"}]
Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Punch and Run", "cost": ["Grass", "Colorless", "Colorless"], "convertedEnergyCost": 3, "damage": "70", "text": "Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon."}]
Attack_Texts: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
FlavorText: If it hears festive music, all its muscles fill with energy. It can't help breaking out into a dance.

Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Sleep Spore", "cost": ["Grass"], "convertedEnergyCost": 1, "damage": "10", "text": "Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep."}]
Attack_Texts: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.
FlavorText: It scatters its shining spores around itself. Even though they're dangerous, nighttime tours of forests where Morelull live are popular.

Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Reckless Charge", "cost": ["Colorless"], "convertedEnergyCost": 1, "damage": "20", "text": "This Pokémon does 10 damage to itself."}]
Attack_Texts: This Pokémon does 10 damage to itself.
FlavorText: The flame on its tail indicates Charmander's life force. If it is healthy, the flame burns brightly.

Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Slash", "cost": ["Fire", "Colorless", "Colorless"], "convertedEnergyCost": 3, "damage": "70", "text": ""}, {"name": "Wild Tackle", "cost": ["Fire", "Colorless", "Colorless", "Colorless"], "convertedEnergyCost": 4, "damage": "180", "text": "This Pokémon does 50 damage to itself."}]
FlavorText: When expelling a blast of superhot fire, the red flame at the tip of its tail burns more intensely.

Abilities: [{"name": "Security Guard", "text": "As long as this Pokémon is your Active Pokémon, all of your Pokémon take 30 less damage from your opponent's attacks (after applying Weakness and Resistance).", "type": "Ability"}]
FlavorText: Legends tell of its fighting alongside a general and conquering a whole country.
Using psychokinesis gives it a headache, so it normally passes the time spacing out and doing as little as possible.
In the distant past, they were fairly strong, but they have become gradually weaker over time.

Abilities: [{"name": "Evasion Jutsu", "text": "If any damage is done to this Pokémon by attacks, flip a coin. If heads, prevent that damage.", "type": "Ability"}]
Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Furious Shurikens", "cost": ["Water", "Water"], "convertedEnergyCost": 2, "damage": "", "text": "This attack does 50 damage to 2 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)"}]
Attack_Texts: This attack does 50 damage to 2 of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
FlavorText: It creates throwing stars out of compressed water. When it spins them and throws them at high speed, these stars can split metal in two.

Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Scout", "cost": ["Lightning"], "convertedEnergyCost": 1, "damage": "", "text": "Your opponent reveals their hand."}, {"name": "Surprise Attack", "cost": ["Colorless", "Colorless", "Colorless"], "convertedEnergyCost": 3, "damage": "80", "text": "Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing."}]
Attack_Texts: Your opponent reveals their hand.|Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.
FlavorText: He loves to show off his vast knowledge. This expressive Pikachu is like a middle-aged man.

Abilities: [{"name": "Pantomime", "text": "When you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench during your turn, you may switch 1 of your face-down Prize cards with the top card of your deck.", "type": "Ability"}]
Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Juggling", "cost": ["Psychic", "Colorless"], "convertedEnergyCost": 2, "damage": "20×", "text": "Flip 4 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads."}]
Attack_Texts: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.
FlavorText: Its pantomime skills are wonderful. You may become enraptured while watching it, but next thing you know, Mr. Mime has made a real wall.

Attack_Texts: Choose 1 of your opponent's Active Pokémon's attacks. That Pokémon can't use that attack during your opponent's next turn.|Discard 2 Psychic Energy from this Pokémon.
FlavorText: This Pokémon was created by years of horrific gene splicing and DNA engineering experiments.

Attack_Texts: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck and put them back in any order.|Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 60 more damage.
FlavorText: It grasps its opponents with its four arms and twists them up in an intricate hold. People call it "the Machamp special."

Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Healing Melody", "cost": ["Fairy"], "convertedEnergyCost": 1, "damage": "", "text": "Heal 10 damage from each of your Pokémon."}]
Attack_Texts: Heal 10 damage from each of your Pokémon.
FlavorText: Recordings of Jigglypuff's strange lullabies can be purchased from department stores. These CDs can be found near the bedding area.

Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Play Rough", "cost": ["Colorless", "Colorless"], "convertedEnergyCost": 2, "damage": "10+", "text": "Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage."}]
Attack_Texts: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.
FlavorText: It grows close to others easily and is also easily spoiled. The disparity between its face and its actions makes many young people wild about it.

Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Continuous Lick", "cost": ["Colorless", "Colorless"], "convertedEnergyCost": 2, "damage": "20×", "text": "Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 damage for each heads."}]
Attack_Texts: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.
FlavorText: It checks out whatever's around it by licking everything. If you don't clean off a spot where it's licked you, you'll break out in a rash!

Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Copy Anything", "cost": ["Colorless"], "convertedEnergyCost": 1, "damage": "", "text": "Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon's attacks and use it as this attack. If this Pokémon doesn't have the necessary Energy to use that attack, this attack does nothing."}]
Attack_Texts: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon's attacks and use it as this attack. If this Pokémon doesn't have the necessary Energy to use that attack, this attack does nothing.
FlavorText: While it can transform into anything, each Ditto apparently has its own strengths and weaknesses when it comes to transformations.

Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Pitch", "cost": ["Colorless", "Colorless", "Colorless", "Colorless"], "convertedEnergyCost": 4, "damage": "150", "text": "Your opponent switches their Active Pokémon with 1 of their Benched Pokémon."}]
Attack_Texts: Your opponent switches their Active Pokémon with 1 of their Benched Pokémon.
FlavorText: The world's laziest Pokémon. It moves to another spot when there's no food left within its reach.
